title: paphiopedilum × kimballianum
intro: Paphiopedilum × kimballianum, also known as the Kimball's Venus Slipper or Venus slipper orchid, is a hybrid orchid species obtained from the cross between Paphiopedilum victoria-regina and Paphiopedilum victoria-regina var. aurantiacum. The plant is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paphiopedilum × kimballianum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
